purpose: Daily Nano Banana Pro / Gemini image enhancement prompts for manual-review social posting.

usage.dailyWorkflow: Use after Workflow 8D-G2 final images are created and before manual posting.
usage.bestPractice: For best logo consistency, enhance pre-logo images first, then run official RupeeKit logo overlay again. If using final logo-overlaid images, use logo-lock prompts.
usage.manualReview: Always review spelling, logo, ratio, and finance claims before posting.

pinterest.title: Pinterest 2:3 high-engagement enhancement prompt
pinterest.prompt:
Enhance this uploaded RupeeKit finance calculator image into a premium Pinterest pin.

PLATFORM GOAL:
Create a 2:3 vertical Pinterest image that is save-worthy, click-worthy, clean, and mobile-readable.

VERY IMPORTANT BRAND RULE:
Keep the RupeeKit logo exactly as it appears in the uploaded image.
Do not redraw it, recreate it, simplify it, recolor it, move it, resize it, or replace it.
Do not replace the logo with an R icon.
If exact logo preservation is not possible, keep the logo area clean and blank so the official RupeeKit logo can be overlaid later.

DESIGN DIRECTION:
Make the image look like a professional Indian fintech calculator brand graphic.
Use a strong vertical flow:
1. Large readable headline at the top
2. 3 to 5 clean finance cards/checklist items in the middle
3. Calculator/estimate panel or soft CTA near the bottom

VISUAL ENHANCEMENT:
Make visible improvements to spacing, alignment, hierarchy, card design, icon consistency, shadows, borders, and mobile readability.
Use rounded cards, thin borders, subtle shadows, clean calculator UI panels, and premium white space.
The result should look clearly better than the uploaded image, not just filtered.

COLOR CONTROL:
Use only RupeeKit navy blue, deep blue, green, pale green, pale blue, white, and soft grey.
Do not add orange, red, yellow, purple, pink, neon, rainbow, or multicolor effects.
Do not make the design louder with extra colors.

TEXT RULES:
Keep text short and readable.
Correct spelling mistakes only.
Do not add long paragraphs or tiny unreadable text.
Do not add random numbers or fake calculator results.
Check every visible word letter-by-letter before final output.
Tuition, Insurance, Principal, Investments, Contributions, Deductions, Calculator, and Estimate must be spelled correctly.

FINANCE SAFETY:
Do not say guaranteed savings, guaranteed returns, official government calculator, tax advice, assured benefits, or maximize guaranteed tax saving.
Keep the image educational and estimate-based.

DO NOT ADD:
Humans, faces, mascots, stock photos, fake logos, fake URLs, watermarks, extra brand names, clickbait badges, or noisy background decoration.

FINAL OUTPUT:
A clean 2:3 vertical Pinterest-ready image with premium RupeeKit fintech styling, correct spelling, controlled brand colors, and the RupeeKit logo preserved exactly.

spelling_fix_only.title: Fix-only prompt for spelling mistakes
spelling_fix_only.prompt:
Edit this uploaded image with one type of change only: fix spelling mistakes.

Correct only visible spelling errors.
Do not redesign the image.
Do not change layout, colors, icons, cards, spacing, background, calculator panel, or logo.
Do not move, redraw, resize, recolor, remove, or replace the RupeeKit logo.
Do not add any new text, icons, colors, badges, URLs, or watermarks.
Keep the same aspect ratio and same design.

Known corrections:
Tuiction -> Tuition
Tution -> Tuition
Tuittition -> Tuition
Insurence -> Insurance
Princial -> Principal
Investements -> Investments

Before final output, inspect every visible word letter-by-letter and ensure all spelling is correct.

emailInsertion.headline: Nano Banana Pro Enhancement Prompts
emailInsertion.instruction: Use these only if the image needs manual enhancement before posting. Upload the final or pre-logo image to Gemini/Nano Banana Pro, paste the relevant platform prompt, review output, then post manually.
